title: lastrea pubirachis
intro: Lastrea pubirachis, also known as the Maidenhair fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea pubirachis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, Lastrea pubirachis is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it is used in traditional herbal remedies such as tinctures and capsules.
